ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Steneberg for Western National Trust.

The Court questioned why the estate was paying for the mileage when the vehicle was in the name of the trust. Ms. Steneberg stated that it was a benefit to the Mother as she was on a low income, that the Caregivers were being reimbursed for gas, that it should not have been categorized as mileage and that she suggested the Trustee set up a charge account for the gas. The Court stated there was no problem with the request for the van, that the IBAR payment was confirmed and that the CPA costs would be deducted from the Trustee's fees. In addition, the Court stated that there was a problem with the $5,000.00 figure in attorney's fees and that the trust was being charged for the corrections on the 3rd account. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.
